name: getGameHighScores
description: Use this method to get data for high score tables. Will return the score of the specified user and several of their neighbors in a game

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Unique identifier for the target chat.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Identifier of the sent message.

parameters.name: inline_message_id
parameters.description: Required if chat_id and message_id are not specified. Identifier of the inline message.

notes: This method will currently return scores for the target user, plus two of their closest neighbors on each side. Will also return the top three users if the user and their neighbors are not among them. Please note that this behavior is subject to change.
